headline: Savvy Wealth Crosses $3B AUM With 500% Growth, Closes $72M Series B With Former LPL CEO on Board
summary: Savvy Wealth's AI-augmented advisor platform has crossed $3 billion in assets under management, growing 500% since early 2024, with 100 wealth managers now on the platform and nearly $500 million added in 2025 alone. The $72 million Series B — led by Industry Ventures ($8B in committed capital) and completed in top-decile speed per Carta — brings total funding past $100 million. Former LPL Financial CEO Mark Casady has joined the board via his firm Vestigo Ventures. The executive team includes Carta's founding CTO Eric Hurkman and former Compass Head of Growth David Weiner, signalling infrastructure-grade ambition rather than a point-solution play.
the_so_what: Savvy's $3B AUM at 500% growth with 100 advisors puts it in direct comparison with Altruist, which reached 1,600 RIA firms in its first month after launching Hazel. Both are AI-native platforms competing for the same independent advisor segment — but where Altruist leads on custodial AI integration, Savvy is building the full-stack service layer (tax prep, estate planning, 401k, alternatives) that advisors currently assemble from 5-6 separate vendors.

key_stat.label: AUM crossed, growing 500% since early 2024 with 100 advisors

capability_evidence.evidence: 100 wealth managers on platform managing $3B+ AUM, with full-stack services including direct indexed portfolios, tax preparation, estate planning, 401(k), alternatives, and insurance.
capability_evidence.metric: 500% AUM growth since early 2024; ~$500M added in 2025 YTD

people: Eric Hurkman — CTO (former founding CTO of Carta)
David Weiner — Chief Growth Officer (former Compass)
entities.key_topic: AI advisor platform Series B + AUM milestone

landscape_context.peer_comparison: Altruist (deployed, 1600 RIAs in month 1), Arta AI (piloting, 3 agents at 5 partners)

_research.whats_new: First entry for Savvy Wealth. $3B AUM crossed, 500% growth, $72M Series B with strong board additions.
